name: chr20_20p13_OXT_AVP_SD
description: 20p13 SD region containing the tail-to-tail OXT/AVP gene pair (oxytocin and arginine-vasopressin neuropeptides), which arose by inverted duplication of an ancestral neurophysin gene. The two genes lie ~12 kb apart in opposite orientation and form a classical intra-locus paralog.

architecture.internal_structure: Two ~2 kb paralog genes (OXT 5'->3' and AVP 3'<-5') in tail-to-tail inverted orientation ~12 kb apart; ~80% nucleotide identity in coding regions and neurophysin domain; short flanking SDs <10 kb.
